creator: wolfgang@lyxys.ka.sub.org
text: I could of course manually build the nox11-variant by overriding the DEFAULT_VERSIONS entry. However, I use poudriere to build about 2000 ports for many machines, and I do so in three sets with different DEFAULT_VERSIONS. Doubling this to have both a x11 and a nox11 variant would add about a day to my build times and I would prefer to avoid this :-)
